package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for string_builder_write_string_vs_plus: `builder.WriteString(a + b)` where `a` and `b` are separate bindings
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario644Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
